data.content: Amplified settings UI with stronger purple/green visual styling across the settings sheet and sections: richer gradient shell, glow accents, bolder borders/hover states, dispatch mode card polish, repos card/list upgrades, pools purple-green palette refresh, and stronger action/default control surfaces. Quality gates: bun run lint (warnings only), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test (1926 passed), NODE_ENV=production bun run build (success). Agent metadata: codex / gpt-5 / v1. Feature branch commit: edb68dbb462d. Integrated on main as 2f9e25a8919e and pushed to origin/main.
